description_long: This is a modern military fighter jet with a sleek, angular fuselage and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. The aircraft features swept-back wings with red and gray markings, and visible hardpoints under the wings for mounting missiles or other ordnance. The nose is sharply pointed, with a cockpit canopy positioned near the front and a distinct shark mouth graphic painted on the side. The jet is equipped with two large jet engines at the rear, and the landing gear is deployed, showing a tricycle configuration. The tail section is adorned with bold red and white graphics, and the overall surface appears metallic with a matte finish.
description: A modern military fighter jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward cockpit, finished in gray with red markings and a shark mouth graphic.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, twin vertical stabilizers, and the overall angular shape of the jet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the shark mouth nose art, cockpit canopy, and visible landing gear with underwing ordnance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin jet engine exhausts, tail section, and the symmetry of the vertical stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the tail graphics, cockpit, and the aircraft's aerodynamic profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets; moderate anhedral angle for enhanced maneuverability.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely multi-seat based on canopy length.
